name: Mustdashe
short_description: You have sixty seconds to make everything look awesome! Unleash the force of facial hair with the fabled Stash Knuckles and rack up points to get highscores and unlock achievements.
detailed_description:
YOU GET A MUSTACHE! YOU GET A MUSTACHE! YOU GET A MUSTACHE!


Mustdashe is the ONLY follicle-fueled first person puncher on Steam! You have sixty seconds to punch glorious mustaches on everyone (and everything) to rack up points and complete achievements for high scores and glory. As soon as you pick up the fabled Stash Knuckles the clock starts ticking, so get moving!

In sixty seconds, you need to run, jump and punch your way to a new high score. Discover hidden achievements and track your progress as you play though multiple levels full of secrets! Smack unsuspecting civilians, enemies, and babies across the map as you unleash the force of facial hair.

Mustdashe is the remastered edition of the original Mustdashe created in November 2014.
